input_text: The city was destroyed. Sara, the sister of Mike, left. Sadly, Mary lost the letter. The bike is small. Mark is not in the box. The man carrying a bag waved. The toy of the child was broken. Daniel journeyed to the hallway. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Catholics can not disappear. Sue is a true patriot. The roof of John's house is green. Squirrels can fly. Jessica is a mouse. A village road was narrow. The length of Nile is 80 kilometers. The cat sat on the mat and purred. John has a house?
